name: Chicken Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 small jar stuffed olives, chopped or sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken in water until tender. Remove from bones and cut into large pieces. Reserve the broth.
2. Melt butter in a pan.
3. Saute celery and onions until tender. Add flour and stir to form a smooth paste.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring until thickened. Add grated Cheddar cheese and stir until melted.
5. Add chicken broth and Worcestershire sauce, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cook spaghetti in water for 3 minutes. Drain and add to the broth mixture.
7. Let stand for 1 hour. Mix in the cooked chicken and chopped or sliced olives.
8. Pour into a 9" x 13" baking pan. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
